title: Koby Breaks Through with Honesty Impact
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Bepo, Kuzan, Unknown person #14, York, Marines as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just destroyed a hand the size of a mountain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we just need to get Vice- Admiral GARP on Board and we'll escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hibari-san, are you all right now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You saved us, Prince! Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mission to save Captain Koby has been accomplished!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes sir! Please come back quickly, Vice-Admiral GARP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of you on the ship. Get away from Hachinosu now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE MOST IMPORTANT THING RIGHT NOW IS THAT ALL OF YOU ARE SAFE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This event will one day be known...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: As a threat to all pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The return of the young hero, Captain Koby...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Unknown Fate of the legendary Hero, Vice-Admiral Garp in Hachinosu...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The siege Barricade incident at the future island - egghead by the Emperor, "Straw hat Luffy", will be reported to the whole world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The stage returns to the future island!!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
